name: Mushroom, Pepper and Onion Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Medium onion, cut into wedges
2. Green pepper, cut into thin strips
3. 1/4 tsp dried thyme leaves, crushed
4. 1 can condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
5. 1/2 cup water
1. In a 1 1/2-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook onion, pepper, and thyme in hot oil until vegetables are tender.
2. Stir in soup and water. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Serve over grilled or broiled steak. Makes about 2 1/2 cups sauce.
